title: Xootz Cobolt Kids Electric Motorbike, 150W Motor 8/16 km/h Speed Modes, 14.4V Lithium Battery, Handbrake, Padded Seat and Mudguard, Motorcycle Gift For Kids Age 6+
features: ULTIMATE RIDING EXPERIENCE: With a power of 150 watts, the Cobolt balances speed, safety, and comfort giving kids the thrill of riding while staying in complete control with top speeds of 16km/h.
SMOOTH AND SAFE BREAKING: The mechanical handbrake provides quick and reliable stopping power, ensuring peace of mind for parents and safety for kids.

LONG LASTING PLAY: The 14.4V lithium rechargeable battery gives up to 2 hours of fun on a single charge, with faster recharging, lighter weight and longer lifespan than standard batteries, so your little rider spends more time playing.
EXTENDED COMFORT: The padded seat offers hours of riding comfort, while the footrest provides extra support, helping kids maintain balance on every ride.
CLEAN RIDING ADVENTURES: The built-in mudguard prevents mud and debris from splashing up, keeping the bike and rider clean during off-road explorations.

product_details_tab_data.Title: Xootz Cobolt Kids Electric Motorbike, 150W Motor 8/16 km/h Speed Modes, 14.4V Lithium Battery, Handbrake, Padded Seat and Mudguard, Motorcycle Gift For Kids Age 6+
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Toys & Games › Sports Toys & Outdoor › Bikes, Trikes & Riding Toys › Electric Ride-ons
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: • Never drive on public roads, highways, or footpaths and always watch your surroundings for pedestrians, bikes, and other potential hazards. Use the go kart only in areas free from fixed or moving obstacles such as poles, curbs, traffic, or uneven ground. • Always check and obey any local laws or regulations which may affect the locations where the go kart may be used. Check with your local authority about the limitations of use and regulations. • It is prohibited to use this product on the road under Section 143(1)(a) of the Road Traffic Act 1988. • It is prohibited to use this product on public footpaths under Section 72 of the Highway Act 1835. • Electric go karts can only be used legally on private land, to which the public do not have access, with the permission of the landowner. All promotional video and imagery has been filmed on private property with the landowner’s permission.
